title: Way Too Simple Wynncraft Ranks
description: Way Too Simple Wynncraft Ranks are too simple I can't really describe how Simple they are
body:
## About
Way Too Simple Wynncraft Ranks is a resource pack that changes the rank icons in Wynncraft to look very simple and clear. The idea came from the original role icons used in the official Wynncraft Discord.

### Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7adbfa0825872df700369c94d9f84a11fa9ef12.png)
